recentPosts.text: Foreclosure auction Before and After - Won for 136k, Rehab 70k, UA for 360k
Can you really get a LAKE HOUSE for half price at a foreclosure auction? We took our shot - live bidding, real numbers, no fluff. Watch how it played out.
Auction day tip: the opening bid isn't the price - your total is. Back taxes, liens, repairs... add it ALL up before you raise your hand. The winners did their math before they showed up.
We just won a house at a foreclosure auction for $165K! Kevin breaks down the whole process - touring the property, the bidding strategy, and how to spot hidden deals.
Tax liens can be a great way to buy Real Estate for cheap. Here are some things to know
How we screen tenants: 680+ credit score, income 3x the monthly rent, clean background check, no open housing court cases, landlord reference

actionableTips: Long-form videos currently get 150-400 views. Titles with specific dollar amounts perform 2-3x better.
Best-performing content features real auction experiences with specific numbers.
Videos over 10 minutes tend to perform better for this niche.
Shift from 7 shorts/week to 2-3 long-form + 3-4 shorts.
Thumbnails should consistently show the property + price overlay.
Use series playlists (Foreclosure Auction Diary, Auction Day).
Hook viewers in first 30 seconds with the outcome/result.

monetization.currentIssue: Most views come from shorts (~$0.04/1K views vs $3-7/1K for long-form)
monetization.channel2Status: Needs 1,000 subs + 4,000 watch hours (currently 818 subs - close!)
